/usr/bin/cc -fPIC  -Wl,--no-undefined -shared -Wl,-soname,libgps_visualization__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so -o libgps_visualization__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so CMakeFiles/gps_visualization__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.dir/rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c/gps_visualization/msg/detail/nav_sat_fix_array__type_support.c.o  -Wl,-rpath,/root/ros2_ws/build/gps_visualization:/opt/ros/jazzy/lib: libgps_visualization__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_typesupport_introspection_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libsensor_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libgeometry_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libstd_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libservice_msgs__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/libbuiltin_interfaces__rosidl_generator_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librosidl_runtime_c.so /opt/ros/jazzy/lib/librcutils.so -ldl -latomic
